embeds.description:
Hello Keepers 👋.

This channel is your go-to resource for frequently asked questions about our beloved Morimens game.

Before posting a question, please check here to see whether it has previously been answered.  We will keep this channel updated on a frequent basis to ensure that you get the most u

embeds.title: TERMINOLOGY QUESTIONS
embeds.description:
**Q: What is “Faded Legacy” and “Astral Reign”?**

•	“Faded Legacy” is the name of Arc 1 of the story. This covers the first 9 chapters of the main story. Limited characters released during this timeframe are referred to as “Faded Legacy” limited Awakeners

•	“Astral Reign” is the name of Arc 2 of t

embeds.title: GACHA QUESTIONS
embeds.description:
**Q: What are the gacha rates in this game?**
•	The base SSR chance per pull is 3.03%. SSR pity is 30 pulls, meaning you are guaranteed an SSR on the 30th pull without one
•	Cumulatively, this means that the overall chance to obtain an SSR per pull is 5% when taking the SSR pity into account

**Q: H

**Q: How does the gacha work for standard Wheel of Destinies (WoD)?**
•	The standard WoD banner (Wheels of Rotation) allows you to choose any one standard WoD as the rate-up WoD. This WoD will have a 33.33% chance of appearing on pulling an SSR. 
•	If you fail to pull the limited WoD, there is a 10%

embeds.title: GAME MECHANICS QUESTIONS
embeds.description:
**Q: What is Realm Mastery?**

•	Realm Mastery increases certain Realm-specific effects. The more Realm Mastery you have, totaled across your team, the stronger the effect.
•	If your team is mixed-Realm (i.e., comprised of Awakeners from any two different Realms out of Aequor, Caro, or Ultra), you w

embeds.title: LOCALIZATION QUESTIONS
embeds.description:
**Q: I heard this game was AI-translated! Is that true?**

•	Due to the developers being a small studio, initial English localization for this game was done via AI-translation tools due to lack of budget for hiring professional localizers
•	However, due to improving financials, most of the English t

embeds.title: BEGINNER QUESTIONS (COMMUNITY OPINION)
embeds.description:
